Sway_Type_Description: Distract Wounds are the simplest Wound that represent a target being momentarily distracted.
Distract Wounds are the simplest Wound that represent a target being momentarily distracted.
Flesh Wounds are Wounds that must be acknowledged, but are not permanent.
Distract Wounds are the simplest Wound that represent a target being momentarily distracted.
Maim Wounds are damage that remove a Proficiency Slot until healed.
Crippling Wounds remove an Annex Slot until healed.
Flesh Wounds are Wounds that must be acknowledged, but are not permanent.
Mortal Wounds are the first Wounds that create Hitches for the Target. Mortal Wounds usually create Quirk Hitches

Carnage Wounds usually create Flaw Hitches for the Target
